summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new data merge and visualization features. All 23 backend API tests passed. Frontend dashboard shows 3 new charts (Deployment Model, Custom vs COTS, Apps by Functional Area) with correct data. Inventory page has new Deployment and App Type columns with working filters. Application Detail page displays new fields correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Recharts SVG overlay intercepts click events on pie chart segments, making direct click-through difficult
ui_bugs.impact: Users can still navigate via URL parameters; chart click-through may require force click

passed_tests: Dashboard KPIs: 441 total apps, 244 active, 197 inactive
Dashboard chart: Deployment Model pie chart renders with SaaS (69%), On-Premise (11%), Unknown (19%), IaaS/PaaS (1%), Multiple (0%)
Dashboard chart: Custom vs COTS pie chart renders with COTS (96%), Custom (4%)
Dashboard chart: Apps by Functional Area bar chart renders with IT, Sales, Engineering, Enterprise, HR, Marketing, Product, Finance, Legal
Existing dashboard charts (Spend by Category, Application Status, Apps by Category, Owner by Department) still render correctly
API GET /api/dashboard/custom-vs-cots returns array with type, count, total_spend (COTS: 424, Custom: 17)
API GET /api/dashboard/deployment-model returns array with model, count, total_spend (SaaS: 306, On-Premise: 47, Unknown: 82, IaaS/PaaS: 5, Multiple: 1)
API GET /api/dashboard/apps-by-functional-area returns array with area, count, total_spend (IT: 66, Sales: 43, Engineering: 34, etc.)
API GET /api/filters/options returns deployment_models and app_types arrays
Inventory page shows Deployment and App Type columns
Inventory page filter by deployment_model=SaaS shows 306 results
Inventory page filter by app_type=Custom shows 17 results
Inventory page filter by primary_functional_area=IT shows 66 results
Application Detail page (LinkedIn Sales Navigator) shows Deployment Model badge (Unknown), App Type badge (COTS), and Functional Area (Sales)
seed_data_creation: None - using existing 441 apps from Excel merge
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 3 new dashboard charts (Deployment Model pie, Custom vs COTS pie, Apps by Functional Area bar), new filter options (deployment_models, app_types, functional_areas), new inventory columns (Deployment, App Type), new application detail fields (Deployment Model, App Type, Functional Area). All working correctly. LinkedIn Sales Navigator (app_id: 9f2140f2-0b8a-4fbb-b278-d12c520d41f5) is a good test app with primary_functional_area=Sales, app_type=COTS.
